description: Maven POM fixture with one entry in the vulnerable Text4Shell range. `org.apache.commons:commons-text@1.9` falls inside the 1.5..1.9 inclusive range recorded in vulnerabilities/supply-chain/malicious-packages/maven.json (CVE-2022-42889, RCE via StringSubstitutor). `junit:junit@4.13.2` is a clean control entry.
